Practitioner-Led System Training

GuestPoint PMS Course

Structured system training for independent motel operators using GuestPoint PMS.

This course provides practical GuestPoint training aligned with real motel operations — not generic software tutorials.

View Course Modules Watch Intro Video

Why GuestPoint Training Matters

GuestPoint controls reservations, room allocation, payments, debtors, housekeeping workflow, daily reconciliation, and reporting.

Errors inside the PMS affect revenue, reporting, and guest experience. This course ensures you operate GuestPoint with confidence and control.

Motel Coach is a recommended consultant and trainer by GuestPoint.

As featured in Accom News

"How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager"

GuestPoint PMS Curriculum

System Foundations

GuestPoint System Overview & Navigation, understanding the PMS environment, and access setup with the right permissions.

  • System architecture and operational logic
  • User access, roles, and permissions

Reservation Management

Creating and managing reservations, modifying and moving bookings, and running accurate guest check-out.

  • Corporate account reservations
  • Travel agent profiles & linked bookings

Operational Workflows

  • Group bookings setup and management
  • Posting payments and room charges
  • Housekeeping coordination and room status control
  • Debtor account setup and management

Reporting & Daily Operations

  • Interpreting and using GuestPoint reports
  • Managing daily motel operations in GuestPoint
  • End-of-day reconciliation and error prevention

Choose How You Want to Learn

Self-Guided

$89

Course duration: 7–21 days No certificate

Self-guided access to the full GuestPoint PMS content. Ideal if you want a structured introduction to the system without formal assessment.

Includes a Motel Management folder with real-world templates, checklists and documents used to run an independent motel.

Most Popular

Self-Guided + Testing

$189

Course duration: 7–21 days Certificate included

Self-guided learning plus structured assessments to validate your competency in GuestPoint and award a certificate you can present to owners and employers.

Includes a Motel Management folder with the templates, checklists and operational documents used in real motels.

Priority Course

$675

Course duration: 7–21 days Certificate + 1:1 coaching

Starting a role and need to learn GuestPoint fast? Our Priority Course pairs you with an experienced motel manager for two full days of intensive coaching, with guided implementation support over 7–21 days.

Includes the full Motel Management folder of templates and real documents we use to operate motels day-to-day.

Meet your Instructor

Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Instructor at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management.

His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups, progressing from frontline roles through to executive management overseeing 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff.

With experience across regional Australia, Brisbane, and London, Benjamin specialises in motel profit optimisation, OTA strategy, and practical implementation for independent operators.

Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the course instructor? +
Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Instructor at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management. His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups, progressing from frontline roles through to executive management overseeing 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff.
Is the course self-paced? +
Yes, the course is self-paced with some instructor led sessions.
Do I get a certificate on completion? +
Yes. Because we provide a certificate of completion, we ensure all students understand the material before completing the course and support anyone who needs extra help.
Do you offer refunds? +
In the event the course is not for you we have a 10-day money back guarantee.

Ready to Master Motel Operations?

Stop guessing and start yielding. Get the definitive 190+ page manual on Australian motel management, packed with hundreds of operational templates and checklists.

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
